And also, I'm supposed to own the relationships more so that you can focus more on the content creation where you are responsible for how good the content is.
But I had a big call with Marcel, Matthew, and Bridget yesterday, and they told me that especially with large clients, I need to own the relationship and the strategy more.
So especially with Bati and others, I'll be more involved than I thought I was going to be so that you can focus on the content work more.
Okay.
And I think there will still be quite a lot of changes in how programmatic happens, but I think the biggest difference is that it's always much more engineering heavy than content creation heavy.
Is there anything else?
think I got what I need.
I got what I needed to, so thanks.
I'm not sure if I'll have that.
I'm rather going to prioritize the calibration article right now.
So I'll in with you again tomorrow on that notion.
Yeah.
Okay.
Thank you.
Thanks, Matta.
See you tomorrow.
One of those.
See you.
Bye.

[Align on progress and next steps for Vapi's pSEO and editorial content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

  - [Focus on delivering a first programmatic page ASAP to show progress](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

## Topics

### Programmatic SEO Progress
